testcase.name: X2Ansible - UI Smoke Tests @smoke @live › Guest login renders RHDH welcome page
X2Ansible - UI Smoke Tests @smoke @live › X2A sidebar link is visible and has correct href
X2Ansible - UI Smoke Tests @smoke @live › Navigate to Conversion Hub via sidebar
X2Ansible - UI Smoke Tests @smoke @live › Navigate to Conversion Hub via direct URL
X2Ansible - UI Smoke Tests @smoke @live › Conversion Hub shows Projects table with expected columns

failure.message: smoke.test.ts:330:7 Conversion Hub shows Projects table with expected columns

testcase.failure:
[en] › packages/app/e2e-tests/smoke.test.ts:330:7 › X2Ansible - UI Smoke Tests @smoke @live › Conversion Hub shows Projects table with expected columns
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: getByText('Conversion Hub') Expected: visible Timeout: 15000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 15000ms - waiting for getByText('Conversion Hub')
at packages/app/e2e-tests/pages/X2AnsiblePage.ts:58
56 | async verifyConversionHubPage() { 57 | const heading = this.page.getByText('Conversion Hub'); > 58 | await expect(heading).toBeVisible({ timeout: 15000 }); | ^ 59 | } 60 | 61 | async clickStartConversion() { at X2AnsiblePage.verifyConversionHubPage (/Users/gharden/Desktop/General/repos/forks/rhdh-plugins/workspaces/x2a/packages/app/e2e-tests/pages/X2AnsiblePage.ts:58:27) at /Users/gharden/Desktop/General/repos/forks/rhdh-plugins/workspaces/x2a/packages/app/e2e-tests/smoke.test.ts:335:19
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── test-results/smoke-X2Ansible---UI-Smoke-5dbc7-table-with-expected-columns-en/test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

testcase.name: X2Ansible - UI Smoke Tests @smoke @live › New Project / Start first conversion button is visible
